title: SalesForce Platform Manager
responsibilities: Oversee the health, scalability, and release integrity of the Salesforce ecosystem
Manage the full lifecycle of Salesforce releases
Establish a Center of Excellence to enable product teams to deploy code safely
Support the streamlining of release management and testing environments for Salesforce, Agentforce, and Data Cloud
skills: Expert-level proficiency with Copado for CI/CD and release orchestration
Deep understanding of the Salesforce multi-tenant architecture, governor limits, and environment management
Proven ability to translate complex technical releases into business-friendly roadmaps
Experience managing 'Business Critical' production environments and working directly with Salesforce's premier support tiers
